nasb.text: Moreover, Uzziah prepared for all the army shields, spears, helmets, body armor, bows and sling stones.

esv.text: And Uzziah prepared for all the army shields, spears, helmets, coats of mail, bows, and stones for slinging.

cnv.text: 烏西雅給全隊軍兵配備了盾牌、矛槍、頭盔、鎧甲、弓箭和用機弦甩的石頭。

ccb.text: 乌西雅为全军备有盾牌、矛枪、头盔、铠甲、弓箭和投石器用的石头，
